user_system_path: Master Audit #445, Pass 2 (Database & data integrity) + D-3 fix. Verdict PASS. Cross-checked the live schema read-only; then FIXED the one gap (D-3): added idx_cost_events_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC) via migration 20260619190000_cost_events_user_index.sql — applied + verified on production Supabase. Guard test + snapshot updated (known_index_gaps now empty). This is the fix-in-pass pivot: don't just audit, fix the cheap/safe finding in the same PR. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 2 + D-3 fix: schema audit + the cost_events index migration (applied+verified) + guard test + findings doc + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, lib, or deps changes. Only the named index migration under supabase/migrations/.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/database/__tests__/data-integrity.test.ts
required_browser_proof: N/A — read-only schema audit + deterministic test, no user-facing surface changed.
acceptance_condition: D-3 fixed (idx_cost_events_user_created applied + verified on production; migration committed; snapshot known_index_gaps empty), data-integrity contract test passes (6/6 green), gate:continuity passes, findings updated in #445.
anti_regression_checks: data-integrity contract test green (6/6); known_index_gaps empty
only the named index migration under supabase/migrations/ changed; no app/api/lib/deps
stop_condition: Stop when the Pass 2 D-3 fix is merged and the next seam is named.
next_command: Continue the audit: Pass 4 (Backend/runtime — carries C-2 directive_retry) or the frontend passes 6-8, OR the deferred cost P0.2 lazy generation. Owner-side: enable Supabase leaked-password protection + MFA.
